seriesMetadata.description:
Min Kyung‑hee falls in love with a spirit called “Zero,” an entity that has followed her around ever since her first year of high school. As soon as she becomes an adult, she holds a “spirit wedding” with Zero and makes a plan: she will use a man in the real world as an empty shell, just a vessel, in order to give Zero a physical body. Things go smoothly at first as she puts in the effort to win over this “shell” man and her plan advances without a hitch. But one day, Kyung‑hee realizes what her own heart truly feels—and she comes to regret all of her choices. She has always chosen to run away rather than take responsibility. Will she avoid it all again this time too, or will she face the consequences of her love and her decisions?

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=850650), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14151563)

When the reader wakes up as Levi, a sickly extra from a family of knights in a discontinued R-rated novel, she knows her days are numbered. To avoid being killed by the villainous Prince Damian during his future rebellion, Levi plans to avoid fighting him and live in the shadows. But fate takes a carnal turn when a lust demon attacks Damian. 

Although Levi successfully purifies the demonic energy inside him, it's only after their unplanned night of passion. Now, the ruthless prince who only desired the throne is dangerously obsessed with a woman he was never supposed to touch.

**Official Translations:**    
[English](https://www.tappytoon.com/en/book/a-villain-consumed-by-desire), [Japanese](https://mechacomic.jp/books/266026)

label: A Saint Opens a Nursery School With a Retired King in Another World in Her Thirties

seriesMetadata.description:
"An unwanted Saint? Fine then, I'll just make a place for myself!"

Kyoko, an around-thirty nursery school teacher, hit rock bottom after her engagement was broken off right before her wedding, forcing her to take a leave of absence from work. Even when she is summoned to another world as a Saint candidate, she is immediately dismissed as "useless."

──But she's determined to overcome this adversity using her childcare skills and her powers as a Saint! With the full cooperation of a fiercely-intimidating former king, she ends up opening a nursery school in this new world?! Surrounded by adorable children and a wonderfully clumsy man, her blissful new slow life begins!

label: 5-Ri no Otoko ni Korosare Sou na hodo Shuuchaku Sarete Imasu

seriesMetadata.description:
Lavinia is a villainous queen in a novel who is murdered by someone she trusts. When the reader wakes up as Lavinia, she knows there are five murder suspects: her seemingly loyal knight, her sly chancellor, her spy who was formerly an assassin, a brutal tribal king, and her brother, who's also her political rival. These men are all fixated on her, but when Lavinia changes her tyrannic ways, their obsession becomes less hostile and more friendly... even romantic, for some! Although her odds of survival are higher, Lavinia isn't sure she can juggle the affections of her dangerous suitors...

**Original Webtoon:**    
[LINE Manga](https://manga.line.me/product/periodic?id=S157885), [ebookJapan](https://ebookjapan.yahoo.co.jp/books/943280/), [honto](https://honto.jp/ebook/pd-series_C-MBJ-21665-4-594524X.html), [Mecha Comic](https://mechacomic.jp/books/260299), [Cmoa](https://www.cmoa.jp/title/358087/) 

**Official Translations:**    
[English](https://www.tappytoon.com/en/book/five-men-are-so-obsessed-with-me-they-might-kill-me)

label: 3 Years Later, He Became My Boss

seriesMetadata.description: [Original Webtoon](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/27817)

label: A Retired Saint Will Raise Your Home Value

seriesMetadata.description:
I ended up transmigrating into the web novel *If You’ve Drawn Your Sword, You Might as Well Cut a Throat*, where the male lead, after endlessly regressing, loses his mind and sets the entire empire ablaze.

…And of all roles, I became one of the countless saintesses.

I have only one goal:

Get out before he goes insane and avoid the fiery ending!

But reality?

“Former Saintess Shuana. You are under arrest on charges of witchcraft and worshipping evil spirits.”

The moment I step outside the temple, some pseudo-religious bounty-hunting maniac starts chasing me, calling me a witch.

“You’re insane, right? Then die as much as you want. I’ll keep coming after you.”

The unhinged male lead obsessively hunts me down, even killing himself over and over just to regress and pursue me.

And to top it all off, I’ve been dragged into his endless regression loop.

…Will I be able to make it out of this novel alive?

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=847991), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13640149)

label: A Day in the Life of a Married Woman in a Missy Look

seriesMetadata.description:
**Original Webtoon:**   
[Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/5700001001), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14016990), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000077665)

categories.name: Sex in Front of an Audience

seriesMetadata.description:
Iroha, a poor student on a scholarship, accidentally injures Kyogoku Matsuri, the school's biggest troublemaker!
Masuri, a hedonistic man, declares Iroha his dog as compensation and, for some reason, forces her to help with his rehabilitation!?

Dahlia had an ecstatic, once-in-a-lifetime experience on her wedding night. As she longed for that moment to happen again, her married life went on in a dull and painfully monotonous way, until she witnessed her husband’s infidelity. One night, while drunk, her husband slipped on the rooftop and died. At her husband’s funeral, Dahlia suddenly finds herself unjustly accused of murdering him. Then Sebastian, her husband’s identical twin brother, appears before her. Sebastian offers to help her avoid the royal guard’s infamous interrogation, on the condition that she bear his child. When she refuses, he reveals a shocking truth. “Dahlia, do you really believe the man who spent your wedding night with you was Calix?” The truth is, the one who shared that intoxicating wedding night with Dahlia was not her husband, but her brother-in-law.

**Original Webtoon:**    
[Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13758423), [Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/297088177), [Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/detail/brotherinlawsproxy), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000076732), [BookCube](https://www.bookcube.com/toon/detail.asp?webtoon_num=260147), [Mootoon](https://www.mootoon.co.kr/comic/moo_list.mg?tcode=avgm), [Qtoon](https://www.qtoon.co.kr/toon/list.mg?tcode=6azo), [Toon365](https://www.toon365.com/domestic/domestic_detail.asp?toon_idx=49143), [ZzangComic](https://www.zzangcomic.co.kr/comic/detailview_comic.asp?comic_idx=52077), [Onestory](https://onestory.co.kr/detail/H049247365), [Nate](https://toonnbook.nate.com/detail/H049247365), [Aladin](https://www.aladin.co.kr/shop/wproduct.aspx?ItemId=388780826), [KyoboBook](https://ebook-product.kyobobook.co.kr/dig/epd/ebook/E000012653155), [Yes24](https://www.yes24.com/product/goods/183640135)

categories.name: Male Lead Falls in Love First

seriesMetadata.description:
After three years of marriage, Shen Zhiyi finally realizes she has only ever been a stand‑in for the “white moonlight” in Gu Huaixu’s heart. Crushed by disappointment, she decides to divorce him. Only then does Gu Huaixu begin to recognize his true feelings for her and try to win her back—but time and again, he ends up hurting Zhiyi because of that same white moonlight.

[Original Webtoon](https://www.kuaikanmanhua.com/web/topic/27706/)

Kang Yu-Jin, an executive director at Shin-A Food, has lived by the belief that proving herself through numbers and skills is everything. 

To seize control of "Shin-A Food", her ultimate goal, she proposes a contract marriage to Ki Seung-Hyun, the president of SOO ENM. Ki Seung-Hyun, who lives while concealing his beastly nature, readily accepts her proposal to use him and cooperates by acting as a loving partner.

**Original Novel:**    
[Chapters](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=8119082), [Volumes](https://series.naver.com/novel/detail.series?productNo=13230931)

label: 2-Shuume no Youhei wa Shizuka ni Ikirahenai

seriesMetadata.description:
The "Grim Reaper" of the battlefield returns to his middle school days. Kurona Masamune, a mercenary who single-handedly turns the tide of battle on the East African battlefield, faithfully followed his father's teachings: "Don't have your own will, just follow orders." Living as the ultimate "tool," he loses his life due to betrayal during a mission. However, when he awakens, he finds himself in a middle school classroom 15 years in the past. "If I could do it over, I could do it better..." With this dying regret in his heart, the strongest former mercenary crushes evil within the school with "his own will" in this revenge action!

Source: [eBookJapan](https://ebookjapan.yahoo.co.jp/books/986099/?type=serialStory), Translated

label: A Pervert Who Only Picks and Devours Other Perverts

seriesMetadata.description:
Who would have thought that a random porn video I stumbled upon would change me this much? Who would have guessed that I’m the kind of pervert who can’t be satisfied by my teacher, my brother-in-law, or even my dad’s friend? 

Every day, I’m drenched in pleasure, my body trembling, yet my heart remains utterly unfulfilled—my perverse desires… Will this person be able to satisfy them today?


[Original Novel](https://ridibooks.com/books/4287002218)    
[Original Webtoon](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/kinky_picking)

label: About Having a Lover Who Is XX

label: "Aisanai Unmei" datta Hazu na no ni ~ Tokimodoshi Kihi no Futatome no Kekkon

seriesMetadata.description:
Christina married David, the young king of the powerful kingdom Romanova. But their marriage was cold; he was beautiful but silent, like an ice sculpture. Believing herself unloved due to her own inadequacies, Christina still loved him. When an assassin's blade threatened David, she shielded him with her own body and died. Yet she wakes up in the past, before their engagement. Granted a second life, Christina decides to live for her own happiness and avoids marrying David. But when they meet again, he is nothing like before—he pursues her with an intensity she never imagined. "I wanted to see you again."

https://www.cmoa.jp/title/350410/

label: A Peace-Loving Vampire Who Has Lived for Tens of Thousands of Years Has Somehow Become the Strongest in the World

seriesMetadata.description:
—No, no, aren't you mistaken?

Alto a vampire who had lived peacefully for about 2000 years, secluded in his own territory.

Then one day, an invitation arrived...

Lord Alto, the oldest vampire among the Four Heavenly Kings of the Demon Lord's Army;
Please participate in the Demon Lord's Army Executive Meeting.
Failure to participate will result in purging.

label: A Punk, Devoted to Pure Love

seriesMetadata.description:
Yujin, a straight-A student who dreamed of getting into medical school, had her entire rhythm thrown off by a brief romance in high school—and ended up blowing her college entrance exams. While retaking the year to try again, her delinquent ex-boyfriend Junha suddenly reappears in her life. Is he here to sabotage her exams once more… or is he still hung up on her? A sexy campus rom-com about two people who are impossibly different—and irresistibly drawn to each other.

**Original Webtoon:**     
[Naver Webtoon](https://comic.naver.com/webtoon/list?titleId=847748), [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13725734)

Yuma, a first-year student, shows up for a trial session at his high school's struggling volleyball club. Surprisingly, his preferred position is the bench! Due to a heart condition, he can only exert himself at full power for exactly five minutes. Why did he join the club with such a heavy restriction? In front of the confused members, he unleashes extraordinary, top-tier plays during his brief window. It turns out Yuma was actually a legendary player during his middle school days! A boy who shines brighter than anyone else for a limited time shatters the common sense of sports

**Official Japanese**

[Manga Zegra](https://manga-zegra.com/series/27c5ff3df24ab?utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio&fbclid=PAZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQMMjU2MjgxMDQwNTU4AAGnl_SjEqS75ps463ns6xSNzY-XxYTqNcVdYlPSB_Q_wzA6bYNfYombpGgfgT4_aem_y7DuCCZyeXTyOq8U7t4u9Q)

label: 100 Oku de Rakusatsu Sareta Seijo wa Tekikoku Ooji no Hanayome ni Naru

seriesMetadata.description: Iris, the kingdom’s only saint, possesses the power to make plants grow. After her country loses a war, she is forced to marry into the neighboring nation. She accepts this fate of her own will in order to protect her people, but on the journey she is attacked by bandits and put up for auction. In the depths of despair, the one who purchases her for 10 billion is Victor, the neighboring country’s second prince, rumored to be cold and ruthless. Iris feels a deep gratitude toward him, yet Victor mistakenly believes she was sold off because she schemed to escape from him.

With perfect specs and face, Lee Seung-Woo
has lived a life loved by both men and women, yet he is an upright, chaste man who has never once "done" love. For him, love was something he could pursue whenever he set his mind to it. That was his belief until he met the impenetrable Baek Su-Rin.

“Noona, think objectively.”
“With this face, with this body… how often do you find a virgin who likes you?”
“Noona, there’s no one in my department as pure as me.”

Completely smitten with Su-Rin, Seung-Woo tries to emphasize his virginity...

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/1716002952)

label: (Jishou) Shinshina Yakuza wa Wakeari Ojou-sama o Amayakashitai

seriesMetadata.description:
On a stormy night, hardened mobster Cha San is limping home when he stumbles upon Shin Ro, a dragon bleeding out on the pavement. It’s love at first sight, pulling two entirely different worlds together in an instant. Fast forward to the present, and the unlikely couple is officially navigating newlyweds bliss. To support his beloved, Shin Ro hilariously adapts to human life by taking a job as a car salesman, while Cha San completely leaves his criminal syndicate behind to become a dedicated, apron-wearing stay-at-home husband. Relying entirely on each other, they dive headfirst into a chaotic, sweet, and incredibly steamy new chapter together.

---

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Bomtoon](https://www.bomtoon.com/detail/newly_married)

**Official Translations:**  
[English](https://www.lezhinus.com/en/comic/dragonslove), [Spanish](https://www.lezhin.es/detail/nidito-de-amor), [French](https://www.lezhinfr.com/detail/bt_1111338), [German](https://www.lezhinde.com/detail/dbd_00535), [T.Chinese](https://www.bomtoon.tw/detail/newly_married), [Thai](https://www.lezhinth.com/detail/Newlywed), [Japanese](https://www.beltoon.jp/detail/newlyweds_but)

label: A Kiss to the Knight Who Swore Revenge

seriesMetadata.description:
“You came to offer your fate to me.” 

Fine is a girl who unjustly lost her two older brothers in the kingdom’s greatest scandal, the “Neltop Incident.” Disguising herself as a man, she becomes a knight and tries to take revenge on the corrupt royal family, but she falls into a trap and is driven into a corner. The one who saves her then is Victor, known as the “Wizard of Ruin.” 

Victor tells Fine, “I’ll grant you your revenge, but in exchange, give me everything you have.” 

What he asks of her is to infiltrate the “Room of Domination,” the secret space of the crown prince and princess, and retrieve the vow ring containing the contract between the royal family and Victor. Fine and Victor begin working together toward the same goal. Though they constantly clash at first, before long, they begin to soothe each other’s loneliness and find themselves drawn to one another… 

A fated romance fantasy woven from the flames of revenge and the light of pure love.

**Original Webtoon:**   
[Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14051297), [Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/revenge_kiss)

**Official Translations:**     
Japanese: [Cmoa](https://www.cmoa.jp/title/338185/)

**Original Webtoon:**    
[Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=13890637), [Ridibooks](https://ridibooks.com/books/1561017549), [Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/doomed_first_love), [MrBlue](https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000078993), [BookCube](https://www.bookcube.com/toon/detail.asp?webtoon_num=260444)

"Look only at me, where I can see you."      

"How would you like to attend a dinner as my partner, Ms. Yun Ha-ru?" 

They were just an ordinary employee and customer—at least, until she dropped her notebook at his house. 

"Honestly, I'm uncomfortable and find it difficult to be involved with you, Mr. Cho Jae-yun."    

"What should I do? I have no intention of letting you go."    

Ha-ru thought everything would end once she accepted his proposal and got her notebook back. But hearing his words, which sounded like he needed her, and feeling a warmth and consideration she had never received before, her fragile heart kept drifting toward him. Even though she knew she was nothing more or less than a partner to this man, it was like a swamp she could neither reject nor escape.    

"I like you."     

"I've come to like you, Director." Even so, she confessed to the man who said he didn't know or believe in love. "If only I could go back to before I liked you... I wouldn't be in this much pain." 

Without knowing that she would regret this day for a long, long time.

**Original Webtoon:**    
R19: [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14051097)    
R15: [Naver Series](https://series.naver.com/comic/detail.series?productNo=14051095)

Yooju is forced to steal her twin sister's identity and enter a marriage of convenience. But Seunghan Do, the chaebol heir she's meant to deceive, sees through her charade from the very beginning. Instead of exposing her, he finds himself enthralled by her dangerous game.

Chae Do-young has admired Seo Ki-hyeon on TV ever since childhood. When they reunite in high school, Ki-hyeon turns out to hide a sharp, calculating nature behind his gentle smile. The person he truly loves is his childhood friend Kim Ga-on — and to win that love, Ki-hyeon uses Do-young as a pawn. Even as she is used and hurt again and again, Do-young cannot stop her feelings for Ki-hyeon.

categories.name: Female Lead Falls in Love First

label: A 28-Year-Old Office Lady Becomes a Villain Prince

seriesMetadata.description:
At the end of a miserable day, office worker Oriha Amakawa was walking home, despairing of the world. Suddenly, lightning struck—and she found herself reincarnated in an unfamiliar world as an unfamiliar prince!?

In utter confusion, she gradually comes to understand the situation and discovers that her original owner, Oliver, was a notorious villainous prince with a ruthless and cruel personality, hated by everyone...!　

Desperate to clear her name, Oriha works tirelessly for the good of the world and its people. A new life begins for this hardworking office worker who has been reincarnated as the most hated person in the world!? An otherworldly revolutionary fantasy!

https://comic-boost.com/content/01730001

On a rainy night, Yuseong wakes up alone among piles of garbage. With no memory of who he is or where he came from, he begins a new life working at Café Noah.

Though his days are peaceful, they are also precarious - until Kim Woohyun, the owner of a hardware store, appears. With a seemingly indifferent yet piercing gaze, he watches Yuseong’s every move, exuding an air of danger.

What Yuseong assumes is a fleeting encounter turns into something more when Woohyun saves him from an attack, and surprises him with unexpected words:

“Don’t we know each other? You don’t remember?”  
“Do you want to be friends?”

Yuseong, numb to his own wounds, and Woohyun, who persistently probes the trembling emotions beneath them, begin a connection. What will the two of them discover at the end of this night?

[Original Webtoon](https://ridibooks.com/books/4624000075)

The story revolves around Ye Chen, a billionaire who married into the family three years ago, only to be kicked out of his home after his wife's betrayal. After the divorce, his ex-wife and mother-in-law's attitudes undergo a dramatic change. His wife begs for another chance, while his mother-in-law is even willing to do housework and cook just to get him back home.

[Original Webtoon](https://ac.qq.com/Comic/comicInfo/id/657129)

**Official Translations:**    
[Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/209311)

label: A Benevolent Curse and a Tasty Childhood Friend

seriesMetadata.description:
'Sex with a childhood friend... Is that possible for anyone?'

Ensign Lee Seol, an S-class hunter in South Korea, has one childhood friend.
Captain Yeo Woogyeong, an S-class hunter who is so outstanding he even received a special promotion.

"You should suck, Seol-ah."

But with this foxy bastard...
She's been caught by a terrible curse that will kill her if she doesn't 'shamelessly' (or 'sexually') stick with him!

[Kissing her childhood friend vs. Kissing her friend's 'balls']

When she was a naive twenty-year-old, after sleeping with Woogyeong while drunk, Seol had resolved never to make trouble again.
However, because of the sudden curse, Seol's resolve crumbles, and their relationship becomes even more complicated...

'Are we still friends, or not?'

[Original Webtoon](https://ridibooks.com/books/1746033656)

Kim Eunchong is the definition of a devoted church boy - in fact, his name literally means “Blessing.” But one heartbroken, drunken night of regret shatters his pristine reputation. He wakes up with a massive hangover and a scandalous secret -  he slept with a man. Even worse, the mystery lover is one of his two best friends from church: Ju Hyeonu or Shin Ian. Eunchong prays that he can bury his mistake forever…but then a blackmail text featuring explicit photos of that sinful night hits his phone. One of his best friends has now turned into his biggest enemy, and returning to his peaceful life of faith is nothing but a pipe dream unless he can catch him. *(Source: Lezhin US)*

label: 50 Ways to Leave a Psychopathic Villain

seriesMetadata.description:
The novel Evelyn Florence wakes up in has an 18+ rating for a totally different reason than one would expect. It is all because of the story’s psychopathic villain, Duke Cael Hartheon, who goes on to torture the female lead in unspeakable ways. But a bad drunken night results in Evelyn getting tied up with the literal worst character in the novel. Now forced into an impending marriage, Evelyn will do whatever she can to make Cael sick of her and leave her first. But if only the blood-red duke didn’t turn out to be such a green flag...!

Violet Everdeen is known as the worst magician in the academy and she is an a illegitimate child from a noble family. Her home life and school life are awful. Suddenly, she gains the power to see visions of the future. The future seen, is a villainess, and an excution. Knowing this, she makes plans to avoid her death and the villainess label.

[Japanese](https://jp.piccoma.com/web/product/200923)

It seems that the fiancée of Ian’s older brother—whose wedding is just around the corner—is having an affair with a coworker.

Determined to stop the marriage, Ian disguises herself as the secretary to the CEO of the company where her would-be sister-in-law works, planning to gather solid evidence within two months.

“Do you think boundaries exist just to be crossed?”

The man she ends up serving, CEO Cha Jeong-han, has a handsome face but a personality that leaves much to be desired. He constantly gets on Ian’s nerves.

“Yes. Boundaries exist to be crossed, actually.”

With no fear of getting fired, Ian decides to freely cross Jeong-han’s carefully drawn lines. And somehow, the once arrogant man who thought himself untouchable—

“Did you put on makeup today?”

“What?”

“It looks like you’re wearing lipstick.”

—suddenly starts acting differently.

“This won’t do.”

A thrilling romantic comedy with a dangerously escalating curve of emotions!

**Original Webtoon:**

categories.name: Female Lead Falls in Love First

seriesMetadata.description: A famous game romance action RPG "Dungeon Academia". In that famous world of "game to the death," I reincarnated as a mob with the worst job possible: "Healer. " My fate was dying right away... However... I'll use my knowledge from grinding this game for days on end in my previous life to overturn that fate. A reincarnation fantasy, where healing is turned into a weapon to fashion a meteoric rise to the strongest in the world.
